contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Designed and implemented full voting rights cash-out settlement pipeline across 5 repos:
  
  - DApp settlement page with governor gate, contributor combobox, auto-compute TDG/USD, paste-to-attach proof, receipt/summary print layout
  - GAS handlers for request JSON emission and settlement processing (Ledger history, offchain transactions, USD provisions, Voting Rights Cash-Outs tab, GitHub paper trail)
  - Edgar dispatch routing for [VOTING RIGHTS WITHDRAWAL REQUEST] and [VOTING RIGHTS WITHDRAWAL SETTLEMENT EVENT]
  - CLI module (voting_rights_settlement.py)
  - SCHEMA.md documentation for Meta Game Scoring Rubric, cash-out data structures, Voting Rights Cash-Outs tab
  - Fixed dao_members.json publisher (redeployed to include 409 contributors from contact info sheet)
  - Fixed const redeclaration conflicts in GAS V8 project (Code.js duplicate with web_app.js)
  - Fixed Ledger history row placement (scan col A instead of getLastRow)
  - Multiple deployment rounds across GAS (1rLl94j @25, 1m8IZPs @23) and Edgar (env vars, service restart)
  - Updated contracts page (truesight.me/contracts/) with corrected event names and new settlement entry
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 300.00
